name: RetinalGenix Technologies Inc.
business: RetinalGenix is developing genetic testing kits, retinal imaging devices, a patient data platform, and pharmaceutical therapies for eye and systemic diseases, targeting patients and healthcare providers.

exposures.sentence: RetinalCamTM, an in-home/remote location patient-activated monitoring and imaging device offering real-time communication and alerting system for physicians available 24/7 and does not require dilation of the consumer’s pupil.
Our Genetic Tests will be our first products to be launched which is currently planned for late 2026 with our GPS oral swab tests.
RTG-2023 for the treatment of dry age-related macular degeneration (dry AMD) and RTG-2024 for the treatment of Alzheimer’s syndrome dementia.

The Company is developing a secure and interoperable database system for genetic information and images controlled by patients for use with their physicians, the RetinalGenix Eye Care Anonymized AI database (RECADTM AI system).

catalysts.event: Launch of first genetic test (GPS oral swab tests)
catalysts.sentence: Our Genetic Tests will be our first products to be launched which is currently planned for late 2026 with our GPS oral swab tests.

catalysts.event: Launch of second genetic test for wet AMD
catalysts.sentence: A second genetic test is being developed to identify positive responders to treatment for wet AMD, which is targeted for launch in 2027.

catalysts.event: Beta tests for Retinal Imaging Platform
catalysts.sentence: The Retinal Imaging Platform is being developed for capturing quality economic pictures of the eyes and is expected to be in Beta tests in 2026 and potentially approved for commercialization in 2027.
We intend to launch RetinalCam TM by the end of 2026.

catalysts.event: FDA submission for wet AMD genetic test
catalysts.sentence: potentially leading to FDA submission for improving patient selection of positive responders to this treatment for wet AMD in 2027.

catalysts.event: IRB study expansion and initial analysis
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate an expansion of the IRB to multistate physicians in the winter of 2026 and the initial analysis by the first half of 2027

tamClaims.claim: Global market for age-related macular degeneration is $16.8 billion in 2025, with $7.1 billion in North America
tamClaims.sentence: The current estimated global market size is $16.8 billion in 2025 with about $7.1 billion in North America.

tamClaims.claim: North American Alzheimer's therapeutic market size is $13.7 billion by 2030
tamClaims.sentence: The North American Alzheimer’s therapeutic market size is estimated to be $13.7 billion by 2030.
